image_url.description: Qobuz cover fallback for matched albums that have no stored local or canonical artwork.

mb_barcode.description: Barcode (UPC/EAN) of the matched MusicBrainz release, used to cross-check Qobuz auto-linking.

original_year.description: First release date of the MusicBrainz release group — the album's original year, as opposed to `year` which may be a reissue/remaster date.

BrowserStreamSettings.description: Per-browser-zone stream delivery choice. Absent means the legacy automatic behavior (lossless on LAN, Opus for remote lossless sources).

opus_kbps.description: Opus bitrate in kbit/s; one of 128, 256, 320.

BrowserStreamSignal.description: The server-side chain for a browser-zone stream, recorded when the stream route serves (or starts transcoding) a local track for that zone. The browser itself cannot see any of this — the source spec comes from the library, and EQ/encode happen inside the derivative pipeline.

output_rate.description: Delivered stream rate/bits: 48000/0 for Opus, source rate/24 for the EQ'd FLAC derivative, source rate/bits for passthrough.

source_rate.description: 0 when the library has no technical metadata for the track.

track_id.description: Local library track this signal describes.

description.description: Editorial review/description (Qobuz `description` field). Present on `/album/get` responses, absent on search-result list items.

release_date.description: Exact release date from `release_date_original` ("YYYY-MM-DD"), when Qobuz provides it.

release_type.description: `album`, `ep`, `single`, `epMini`, `live`, `compilation`, etc. Used by the frontend to group releases in the artist Discography view.

upc.description: Barcode (UPC/EAN) of the release. Cross-checked against the MusicBrainz barcode when deciding whether to auto-link an album.

version.description: Qobuz edition/version label such as `Expanded Edition`, `Live`, or `Remixes`. Artist list payloads often omit `release_type`, so the frontend also uses this value for discography grouping.

RemoteAccessStatus.description: Controller status as reported through the LAN settings API. The listener state only ever changes through `apply()`, which is reachable from persisted settings at startup and the LAN-only settings endpoint.

link_code_issuance.description: Request-scoped authority to issue an internet-facing Remote Access link code. Route handlers replace this conservative default using the actual peer and control-session credentials on each response.

url_hint.description: Display-only convenience URL derived from `external_host`; never an input to auth decisions.

airplay_helper_state.description: Runtime state of the separately built direct-AirPlay process.

browser_stream_signal.description: Server-side chain for the active browser-zone stream, when known.

browser.description: True for a browser-private zone: playable only from the browser session that registered it.

browser_stream.description: Stream delivery choice for browser zones (FLAC vs Opus + bitrate).

x-fozmo-endpoints.loose_reason: UPnP calibration requires a discovered renderer, not the generic local-core sample.
Remote session exchange is registered only on the TLS remote router.
Qobuz proxy/debug endpoints intentionally preserve third-party-shaped payloads.
